entities.name: Solidifying
entities.context: Strategic state for building alignment when consensus is moderate (0.5-0.8) with positive trajectory

entities.name: Locked-In
entities.context: Strategic state indicating commitment with high consensus (>0.8) and stable trajectory

entities.name: At-Risk
entities.context: Strategic state indicating conflict or weakening, triggered by negative trajectory or high divergence

entities.name: Cohesion Index
entities.context: Metric measuring overall strategic alignment using harmonic mean of Consensus and (1-Divergence)

entities.name: Consensus
entities.context: Metric measuring agreement level, ranges from 0.0 to 1.0

entities.name: Divergence
entities.context: Metric measuring strategic spread or disagreement, high divergence (>0.6) triggers At-Risk state

entities.name: Trajectory
entities.context: Metric measuring direction of change over time, negative values (<-0.1) indicate weakening

entities.name: Strategic Diff Tags
entities.context: System for comparing new themes to baseline strategy

entities.name: Amplifies
entities.context: A Strategic Diff Tag type indicating reinforcement of existing strategy with more evidence

relationships.context: Cohesion Index formula includes Consensus as input
Cohesion Index formula uses (1-Divergence) as input
Solidifying state defined by moderate consensus range (0.5-0.8)
Amplifies is a type of Strategic Diff Tag
